overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from a Spider-Man game showing a sunset view of Times Square from a high building perch. The character crouches on a ledge overlooking the busy intersection filled with yellow taxis and illuminated digital billboards while the golden hour light bathes the urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: Times Square digital billboard district at sunset

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is crouched on a building ledge on the left side, overlooking the busy intersection and observing the traffic and pedestrians below

entered.detail: Large digital billboard displaying 'BUMPY SAINTS' with a woman's face on the left building facade
Digital billboard with 'COLEXCO' branding below the Bumpy Saints advertisement
Large red digital billboard displaying 'INTENSE & PERSONAL' with a woman's face on the right building
Row of tall skyscrapers receding into the distance covered with multiple digital screens and billboards
Multi-lane street surface with yellow taxi cabs and other vehicles moving through the intersection
White striped pedestrian crosswalk markings visible on the street surface

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of Times Square at golden hour, with Spider-Man perched on a left building ledge observing the scene. The frame is dominated by massive digital billboards on both sides, including the 'BUMPY SAINTS' and 'INTENSE & PERSONAL' advertisements, while yellow taxis move along the multi-lane street below and pedestrians walk the sidewalks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a bustling urban canyon bathed in the warm glow of golden hour. It begins with a static view from a high building ledge where Spider-Man perches, overlooking the vibrant chaos of Times Square. The camera captures the rhythmic flow of yellow taxis navigating the multi-lane streets below while pedestrians crowd the sidewalks. This urban vista is framed by massive, illuminated digital billboards, including advertisements for Bumpy Saints and Intense & Personal, which cast a colorful light over the scene.
